name: Frozen Tortoni Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip cream cheese with sugar until light.
2. Beat in Amaretto liqueur.
3. Whip whipping cream until light and fold into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Gently fold in the finely chopped peanut brittle.
5. Pour the mixture into 8 large muffin cups lined with gold or silver foil liners.
6. Freeze for 2 hours or until frozen solid.
7. Before serving, remove from the freezer and sprinkle with orange or lemon peel.
8. Tortoni cream can be stored in the freezer for up to 4 weeks.
